content:
Name: Mike M

Artist: Lou Gramm
Title: Just Between You And Me

Standard Tuning


CHORDS

     [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Dm[/ch]    [ch]Gm[/ch]

[tab]E-|--0----1----3------3-----0----3-----1----3---|
B-|--1----1----3------3-----1----0-----3----3---|
G-|--0----2----0------0-----2----0-----2----3---|
D-|--2----3----2------0-----2----0-----0----5---|
A-|--3----3----2------3-----0----2-----0----5---|
E-|--0----1----0------0-----0----3-----0----3---|[/tab]


INTRO

      Csus2  x8              Fadd9  x4               Csus2  x4

[tab]E-|--------3--|         E-|--------3--|         E-|--------3--|

A-|--3--------|         A-|-----3-----|         A-|--3--------|
E-|-----------|         E-|--1--------|         E-|-----------|[/tab]

The intro is played throughout the verse, or you can just play the chords


VERSE 1

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Staring at each other with accusing eyes[/tab]

Keep our voices low, don't act surprised
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]
If the word gets out, yeah, that's alright[/tab]

I know you're just looking for some sympathy

But listen you don't know how it gets back to me
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
You're getting reckless, girl, but that's alright[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Em7[/ch]
Now don't you know that one cold word[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 
Is going to lead to another[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Em7[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
And then we'll have nowhere to go[/tab]


CHORUS

[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]    
Even if heaven and earth collide tonight[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
We'll be all alone in a different light[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I don't care what the world can't see[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]  
It's just between you and me, you and me[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]

But we don't take the time
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                        [ch]C[/ch]

Now you can turn the page or you can tear me apart

Don't make an open book out of my private heart
